reference: Hi, I am twenty-five years old. I got married almost two years ago. A year ago, I saw a gynecologist who told me my thyroid-stimulating hormone and prolactin levels are high. She gave me tablets. After two months, I conceived, but I had a miscarriage. Since then, I have not conceived. Now I am in treatment, but it has not been successful. Currently, I am taking a safe folic acid supplement. What should I do next?
text: Hi, I am 25 years old. I got married almost two years ago. A year ago, I saw a gynecologist who told me my thyroid-stimulating hormone and prolactin levels are high. She gave me tablets. After two months, I conceived, but I had a miscarriage. Since then, I have not treated me. Now I am in treatment, but it has not been successful. Currently, I am taking a safe folic acid supplement. What should I do next?
